descriptionEn:
Hacienda Beach Bar is one of the most popular beachside destinations on Potamos Beach in Epanomi, known for its relaxed atmosphere, excellent service, and prime waterfront location. Featuring a modern Mediterranean-inspired design, it provides the perfect setting for a carefree summer day by the sea. Guests can unwind on comfortable sunbeds while enjoying refreshing cocktails, quality coffee, and a variety of light meals and snacks. The clear, shallow waters make it an ideal choice for families with children, couples, and groups of friends alike. As the sun begins to set, Hacienda transforms into a lively seaside spot where visitors can enjoy the stunning views across the Thermaic Gulf.

вҳҖпёҸ Complimentary sunbeds with minimum consumption.

Facilities:

рҹҸ–пёҸ Organized Beach
рҹҚ№ Premium Cocktails & Drinks
вҳ• Coffee & Refreshments
рҹҚҪпёҸ Light Meals & Snacks
рҹҡҝ Showers Available
рҹҡ— Nearby Parking
рҹҢ… Beautiful Sunset Views
рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§вҖҚрҹ‘Ұ Family Friendly
вқӨпёҸ Perfect for Couples
рҹ‘Ҙ Great for Groups
descriptionRo:
Hacienda Beach Bar este una dintre cele mai apreciate locaИӣii de pe plaja Potamos din Epanomi, renumitДғ pentru atmosfera sa relaxatДғ, serviciile excelente Иҷi poziИӣionarea direct pe malul mДғrii. Decorul modern, influenИӣat de stilul mediteranean, creeazДғ cadrul perfect pentru o zi de vacanИӣДғ petrecutДғ la soare. Vizitatorii se pot bucura de Иҷezlonguri confortabile, cocktailuri rДғcoritoare, cafea de calitate Иҷi o selecИӣie variatДғ de gustДғri Иҷi preparate uИҷoare. Apele limpezi Иҷi puИӣin adГўnci ale plajei fac locaИӣia potrivitДғ atГўt pentru familii cu copii, cГўt Иҷi pentru cupluri sau grupuri de prieteni. Spre searДғ, atmosfera devine mai animatДғ, oferind un loc ideal pentru a admira apusurile spectaculoase ale Golfului Thermaic.

вҳҖпёҸ Иҳezlonguri gratuite cu consumaИӣie minimДғ.
